Name: Average time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Minimum time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch to be followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch after the execution of First Look-Your updates are overdue
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Total resolution time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that include SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and the end of case where activity 'SW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Elapsed time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Awaiting Assignment to Batch
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Average waiting time to the Awaiting Assignment to Batch following First Look-Your updates are due in one week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look-Your updates are due in one week' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Minimum time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the subsequent Manuscript Export Succeeded in cases that end with acceptance
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time it takes Awaiting Assignment to Batch to be done after First Look-Please submit updates
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look-Please submit updates' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'

Name: Time of Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants where the process includes multiple revision cycles

Name: Average time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to Manuscript Export Succeeded compared to the average time from SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Total time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and Manuscript Export Succeeded in comparison with the total time between SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion and Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation

Name: Minimum time for Awaiting Assignment to Batch in cases that previously passed through RW-EIC Accept versus those that passed through SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Awaiting Assignment to Batch and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between Awaiting Assignment to Batch and Manuscript Export Succeeded in variants involving Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time from Awaiting Assignment to Batch to the next occurrence of Manuscript Export Succeeded, grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'", 'end': "activity == 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'group_by': 'case:concept:name'}"
